migration_prompt.question: Should Terraform migrate your existing state?

commands.name: create_local_state
commands.purpose: Create initial local terraform.tfstate before migration.

commands.name: add_cloud_block
commands.purpose: Add HCP Terraform organization and workspace settings.

commands.name: terraform_login
commands.purpose: Authenticate the local CLI before copying state to HCP Terraform.

commands.name: interactive_migration_init
commands.purpose: Run init and answer yes when Terraform asks whether to migrate existing state.

commands.name: automation_migration_init
commands.purpose: Use non-interactive state migration in CI/CD style automation.
